productDisplayName: Puma Women Track Cat Basic White Casual Shoes
description: Brighten up your wardrobe with this feminine pair of Soleil shoes from puma. Sleek, comfortable and strong in a delicate looking design, these shoes look great when teamed with shorts, mini skirts and denims and tees for a cool casual look. UpperSynthetic leather upper for lightweight durabilityStitch detailing and contrast piping for feminine stylingTextile lining for superior comfortFormstripes on the sidesEmbroidered logo on toe box and tongueLace-ups for snug FitMidsoleEcoOrthoLite midsole for maximum comfort, protection from impact and supportOutsoleRubber outsole for traction and gripTextured in herringbone pattern for grip
